case_title: ROOBIAN, JAN VS CHEAVACCI, STEVEN et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,855.00 FILED BY ROOBIAN, JAN AS TO DEFENDANT CHEAVACCI, STEVEN KEYS CABINETRY INC. RIOS, BARBARA AMERICAN CONTRACTORS INDEMNITY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-29-1997 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT C
